tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every single test reads the source file as text and checks for string presence (e.g., 'assert "from integrations.resolver_org_router import resolve_org_for_repo" in source'). No test imports the module, instantiates classes, calls functions, or verifies runtime behavior. This is purely textual pattern matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: An agent could satisfy all tests by simply adding the required import statements and code strings to the file without any of them being functionally correct. For example, adding dead code containing 'await resolve_org_for_repo(', 'uuid4().hex', 'SaasConversationStore.get_resolver_instance', etc. as comments or unreachable code would pass all text-matching assertions.
